examples: Ron was red-haired and beardless again.
You seem to me little more than a band of beardless children.
He had a beardless boyish face fair hair and bright blue eyes.
In a case alongside him stands a 20-inch marble statuette of a much younger Herakles, beardless, sleek and classically muscled in the late Athenian manner.
We'd brought Mohammed, who, while he claimed that he was twenty, didn't look a day older than fifteen and was fresh faced, pretty, and beardless.
